x-meta.name: welcome-email-job
x-meta.author: api
x-meta.summary: v1 job schema — userId, email, locale. Enqueued on signup by API; consumed by worker.

x-expectations.producer: API enqueues exactly once per successful signup. No deduplication on the API side.
x-expectations.consumer: Worker is responsible for idempotency if it adds retry in v2 (no requirement for v1).
x-expectations.coupling: Fire-and-forget: API never reads job status.

locale.description: BCP-47. v1 worker treats any value as `en`.
